name: apd
description: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails. Codex runtime.

interface.longDescription: APD enforces a disciplined spec → builder → reviewer → verifier → commit pipeline with mechanical guardrails. Dispatches specialized agents, blocks out-of-scope writes, signs each step, and auto-runs adversarial review before commit.
defaultPrompt: Run apd help to show the pipeline commands
Start a new APD pipeline from a spec card
Audit current APD configuration with apd doctor
